section_miscategorizations.text: The patient is currently taking eliquis and reports not being sure of the dosage. He states his wife helps him manage his medications. He denies taking any blood thinners.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Content-wise this belongs in S as patient-reported medication history, but there is an internal inconsistency: Eliquis is a blood thinner, so the denial conflicts with the preceding statement. This is not a section error per se, but could mislead a reader; however, it does not warrant resectioning to O, A, or P.
